steps.title: Find the median position
steps.content: There are $33$ fish, so the median is the $\frac{33+1}{2}=17$th value when the weights are ordered.

steps.title: Locate the 17th fish
steps.content: The $10$ fish in tank A are positions $1$ through $10$. The $11$ fish in tank B are positions $11$ through $21$. Therefore the $17$th fish is in tank B.

steps.title: Match the possible weight
steps.content: Tank B fish weigh at least $5$ ounces and no more than $13$ ounces. Of the choices, only $8$ is in that range, so choice B is correct.
